chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-2653 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing 1. For order on office objections 1 to 3. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 12.08.2025 Mr. Muhammad Daud Narejo, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. SIP Manzoor Ahmed, P.S Shah Latif Town, Karachi..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press this petition, the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
